backups.empty: No backups yet. Run one to get started.
backups.noDriverBanner: This database driver doesn't support in-app backups.

restore.dialogBody: This will replace all content, settings, and users with the backup from {{date}}. A safety backup is taken automatically first so this can be undone — backup history and schedule are preserved. Any unsaved edits will be lost and you may need to refresh or sign in again.
restore.success: Restore complete. A page refresh is recommended.

delete.dialogBody: The backup artifact will be permanently deleted. This cannot be undone.
